hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams escalate AML cases efficiently by connecting risk signals, internal policies, and audit evidence into a single operational workflow.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Case escalation depends on manual handoffs
problem_description: AML compliance teams struggle to escalate cases efficiently when risk signals, provider outputs, and internal rules remain disconnected. This fragmentation slows review workflows and weakens audit traceability across escalating suspicious activity investigations.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects risk signals, provider outputs, internal rules and reviewer actions into a unified case escalation workflow that strengthens operational control and preserves a clear audit trail for AML investigations.
workflow_title: From alerts to escalated AML cases
workflow_description: SFTY routes alerts through risk scoring, policy rules and reviews before opening escalated AML cases tracked with evidence and audit-ready decision logs.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond case chaos. Standardized escalation control
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides a provider-neutral compliance layer that structures AML case escalation workflows, connects decisions to evidence, and supports clear audit trails for digital asset teams.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with controlled escalation workflows that preserve audit evidence and enable clear bank due diligence within secure, enterprise-grade deployment environments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support AML case escalation workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how AML cases are routed based on risk rules
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence preserves AML case review history
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how provider outputs integrate into AML case escalation
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for AML compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a structured compliance layer that connects alerts, risk rules, cases, evidence and reports for AML teams managing digital asset business compliance.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage AML case escalation?
faq_2_answer: SFTY applies internal policies to route AML cases based on risk and rules, supporting escalation workflows, reviewer assignments, decision logging and evidence preservation.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve AML audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves comprehensive case history, decision logs and linked evidence to support audit-readiness and traceability for AML investigations and compliance reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates provider outputs across KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, screening and monitoring tools into one connected operational workflow for compliance teams.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace our current AML providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY connects existing KYC, KYT, sanctions and Travel Rule providers, layering structured workflows without replacing the underlying compliance systems.
final_title: Structure AML case escalation with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects risk signals, policies and evidence into controlled AML case workflows for effective escalation.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
